  if(!isReadonly)
  if(key === 'hasOwnProperty')
  if(!isReadonly)
  if(isShallow)
class MutableReactiveHandler
  constructor(isShallow = false)
  set(target, unknown>, key, value, receiver,) → boolean
  if(!this._isShallow)
  if(isOldValueReadonly)
  if(__DEV__)
  if(!hadKey)
  deleteProperty(target, unknown>, key,) → boolean
  if(result && hadKey)
class ReadonlyReactiveHandler
  constructor(isShallow = false)
  set(target, key)
  if(__DEV__)
  deleteProperty(target, key)
  if(__DEV__)
